languages.text: "Мы тут сейчас ничем помочь не сможем. Прости, Йоваха, но твои шансы невелики".
"There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."
languages.original_text: "Мы тут сейчас ничем помочь не сможем. Прости, Йоваха, но твои шансы невелики".

traits.locale_text: "There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slight."
"There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."
"There is nothing we can do here. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slight."
"There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slight."
"There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."

languages.text: 「ここでできることは何もない。ジョヴァハ、申し訳ないが、君のチャンスは少ない」
languages.original_text: "There is nothing we can do here. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slight."

traits.locale_text: 「ここでできることは何もない。ジョヴァハ、申し訳ないが、君のチャンスは少ない。」

languages.text: « Il n'y a rien à faire. Je suis désolé, Jovakha, mais vos chances sont minces. »
languages.original_text: "There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'y a rien à faire. Je suis désolé, Jovakha, mais vos chances sont minces. »

languages.text: "Şu anda yapabileceğimiz bir şey yok. Üzgünüm Jovakha ama çok bir şansın yok."
languages.original_text: "There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."

traits.locale_text: "Şu anda yapabileceğimiz bir şey yok. Üzgünüm Jovakha ama çok bir şansın yok."

languages.text: "Wir können hier nichts mehr tun. Tut mir leid, Jovakha, aber Eure Chancen sind gering."
languages.original_text: "There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."

traits.locale_text: "Wir können hier nichts mehr tun. Tut mir leid, Jovakha, aber Eure Chancen sind gering."

languages.text: «Ya no podemos hacer nada. Lo siento, Jovakha, pero no tienes muchas probabilidades».
languages.original_text: "There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."

traits.locale_text: «Ya no podemos hacer nada. Lo siento, Jovakha, pero no tienes muchas probabilidades».

languages.text: “我们已经无能为力了。很抱歉，约瓦哈，你生还的希望极其渺茫。”
languages.original_text: "There is nothing we can do here now. I'm sorry, Jovakha, but your chances are slim."

traits.locale_text: “我们已经无能为力了。很抱歉，约瓦哈，你生还的希望极其渺茫。”
